inputs.label: Number of Guests
inputs.businessContext: Expected number of attendees at the birthday party.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected number of attendees at the birthday party.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Doğum günü partisine beklenen katılımcı sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Erwartete Anzahl der Teilnehmer an der Geburtstagsfeier.

inputs.label: Cost per Plate (Food)
inputs.businessContext: Catering cost per guest for food, including main course and sides.

businessContext_i18n.en: Catering cost per guest for food, including main course and sides.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ana yemek ve yan ürünler dahil olmak üzere misafir başına yemek ikram maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Catering-Kosten pro Gast für Essen, einschließlich Hauptgericht und Beilagen.

inputs.label: Number of Drinks per Guest
inputs.businessContext: Estimated average number of beverages consumed per guest.

businessContext_i18n.en: Estimated average number of beverages consumed per guest.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Misafir başına tüketilen tahmini ortalama içecek sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geschätzte durchschnittliche Anzahl der pro Gast konsumierten Getränke.

inputs.label: Cost per Drink
inputs.businessContext: Average price per drink (non-alcoholic or alcoholic).

businessContext_i18n.en: Average price per drink (non-alcoholic or alcoholic).
businessContext_i18n.tr: İçecek başına ortalama fiyat (alkolsüz veya alkollü).

inputs.label: Cake Cost
inputs.businessContext: Total cost of the birthday cake, including any custom decorations.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total cost of the birthday cake, including any custom decorations.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Özel süslemeler dahil doğum günü pastasının toplam maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtkosten der Geburtstagstorte, einschließlich individueller Dekorationen.

inputs.label: Decoration Cost
inputs.businessContext: Cost of balloons, banners, tableware, and other decorative items.

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost of balloons, banners, tableware, and other decorative items.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Balon, afiş, sofra takımı ve diğer dekoratif eşyaların maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Kosten für Luftballons, Banner, Tischgeschirr und andere Dekorationsartikel.

inputs.label: Venue Rental Cost
inputs.businessContext: Flat fee for renting the party venue (if applicable).

businessContext_i18n.en: Flat fee for renting the party venue (if applicable).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Parti mekanını kiralamak için sabit ücret (varsa).
businessContext_i18n.de: Pauschalgebühr für die Anmietung des Veranstaltungsortes (falls zutreffend).
